cards.back: A blockchain is a distributed digital ledger technology that records transactions across a network of computers in a secure and transparent manner.
The Ethereum stack consists of the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), the Ethereum smart contract platform, and the Ethereum protocol.

cards.front: What is the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM)?
cards.back: The Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) is a software program that runs on top of the Ethereum blockchain and executes smart contracts written in Solidity.
A smart contract is a self-executing program that automates the enforcement and execution of an agreement or a set of rules between parties on the Ethereum blockchain.
The Ethereum blockchain is a decentralized, distributed ledger that records transactions, smart contracts, and other data in a secure and transparent manner.
